<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-participant-protocol-v30-partyreplicationtargetparticipantmessage-initialize">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-schema-head">
    <h3>com.digitalasset.canton.participant.protocol.v30.PartyReplicationTargetParticipantMessage.Initialize</h3>
    
    <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-summary">1 fields</p>
    
  </div>
  
  <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-description">The Initialize instruction must be the first message to the source participant and must never be sent as the second or later message.</p>
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">initial_contract_ordinal_inclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The ACS contract ordinal (0-based) to send as part of the first SendAcsUpTo instruction.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>

<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-participant-protocol-v30-partyreplicationtargetparticipantmessage-sendacsupto">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-schema-head">
    <h3>com.digitalasset.canton.participant.protocol.v30.PartyReplicationTargetParticipantMessage.SendAcsUpTo</h3>
    
    <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-summary">1 fields</p>
    
  </div>
  
  <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-description">SendAcsUpTo instructs the source participant to send ordered ACS contracts up to a specified maximum ordinal. This instruction lets the target participant flow-control the rate of ACS ingestion.</p>
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">max_contract_ordinal_inclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">ACS contract ordinal (0-based) deterministic on the source participant. This serves as a watermark specifying up to which contract ordinal inclusively the source participant is expected to send ACS contracts. Required</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
